_README: Copy the "Stop" block below into your ~/.claude/settings.json (merge it with any hooks you already have). Replace <you> with your Windows username. This auto-appends a one-line TLDR heartbeat to ~/.claude/tldr-trail/<date>.md on EVERY turn — no /tldr needed. The unknown _README key is ignored by Claude Code. macOS/Linux: use the pwsh path and a forward-slash path to the script.
